use serde_json::Value;
use std::collections::HashMap;

fn process_request(body: &[u8]) -> Result<String, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let data: Value = serde_json::from_slice(body)?;

    let name = data["user"]["name"].as_str().unwrap_or("unknown");
    let email = data["user"]["email"].as_str().unwrap_or("");
    let role = data["user"]["role"].as_str().unwrap_or("viewer");

    let mut result = HashMap::new();
    result.insert("name", name);
    result.insert("email", email);
    result.insert("role", role);

    Ok(serde_json::to_string(&result)?)
}

fn extract_nested_field(config: &Value) -> String {
    config["database"]["connection"]["host"]
        .as_str()
        .unwrap_or("localhost")
        .to_string()
}

fn merge_values(a: &Value, b: &Value) -> Value {
    let mut map = a.clone();
    if let (Some(a_obj), Some(b_obj)) = (map.as_object_mut(), b.as_object()) {
        for (k, v) in b_obj {
            a_obj.insert(k.clone(), v.clone());
        }
    }
    map
}
